Think high pressing is a modern phenomenon?

Arrigo Sacchi's AC Milan, dominating Europe in the late 80s, mastered it first! Their synchronized offside trap and relentless pressure shrunk the pitch like no other. Absolute tactical pioneers who'd still boss most teams today!
Portugal fought hard to secure a 2-1 victory over Croatia in a thrilling #FIFAWorldCup Last 32 clash! 🇵🇹🇭🇷 They're through to the Last 16! What a game! #WorldCup2026 #PORCRO

Only ONE man ever...

...won back-to-back Trebles with TWO different clubs. Yeah, you heard me.

Samuel Eto'o. Barcelona (08/09) then Inter Milan (09/10). Pure, unadulterated winning mentality. He adapted, he delivered, he conquered. Why isn't he higher in your all-time striker lists? Madness.

#FootballFacts #Etoo #AfricanLegends #ChampionsLeague #SerieA #LaLiga #FootballHistory

Forget your Haaland vs Mbappé for a sec! Let's talk pure, unadulterated #9 brilliance from the past!

Marco van Basten, 88-89: Elegant, ruthless, 32 goals for Milan, European champion for club AND country. He could do it all, a true footballing artist.

But R9, 96-98: 73 goals in 76 games at Barca/Inter. An alien. Raw, explosive power & dribbling that broke football. The impact was seismic, truly unstoppable.

Both cruelly cut short by injury, but whose peak made you gasp more? The Swan or Il Fenomeno?

#FootballHistory #StrikerKings

Treble-winner? Impressive. But what about a DOUBLE TREBLE?

Samuel Eto'o isn't just a legend, he's a statistical anomaly! The ONLY player in history to win consecutive trebles with two different clubs: Barcelona (2009) then Inter Milan (2010). Unmatched forward brilliance. Name another African legend with that kind of team impact! #FootballHistory #Eto'o #AfricanLegends

Only ONE African has ever lifted the Ballon d'Or.

George Weah in 1995! His explosive power, breathtaking solo runs, and predatory finishing for AC Milan were simply UNPLAYABLE. A true legend who defied expectations and paved the way. What a player! #Weah #BallondOr #ACMilan #History
